programs.title: Barnwood Builders
programs.desc: Mark splits up his crew so they can conquer two jobs at the same time; Johnny and Tim take down a big tobacco barn that has plenty of antique material worth salvaging, while Graham and Alex tackle a log cabin that's still in great shape.

programs.title: Second Chance Stage
programs.desc: A singing waitress, guitar-shredding grandma, energetic dance instructor, comedic ad exec and flute-playing ironworker get their shot at fame.

programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programs.desc: Joanna reminisces on her honeymoon with Chip in Maine, making mouthwatering lobster rolls, a wedge salad with blue cheese dressing, hush puppies with homemade tartar sauce and a delicious cherries jubilee for dessert.

programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programs.desc: Joanna changes up the American classic; burgers and fries.

programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programs.desc: Joanna shares her love of Mexican food, preparing a feast for the whole family; the menu includes delicious Spinach Enchiladas with a side of Mexican Rice and Charro Beans, Queso Blanco, Fresh Tomato Salsa and Churro Cookies.

programs.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programs.desc: Joanna prepares an Asian-inspired meal with the help of her family.
